description: 26/01/2026 As part of the Republic Day observances, a special screening of Anand Math was organised at SIDBI. The film is a powerful adaptation of the iconic novel Anandamath, which played a significant role in shaping India’s freedom consciousness. The work introduced Vande Mataram, later adopted as India’s National Song, and remains a symbol of unity and national pride. The screening served as a meaningful reminder of the ideals, sacrifices, and patriotic spirit that continue to inspire genera
